global_description: Elongated, cylindrical reptile with smooth, scaly skin, typically in shades of green, brown, or patterned with stripes or spots. Lacks limbs, has a narrow head with slit-like eyes and a forked tongue.

part_details.head: Narrow with slit-like eyes and forked tongue
part_details.skin: Scaly, often patterned with stripes or spots
part_details.eyes: Slit-like, positioned on sides of head

spatial_relations: Head at front of elongated body
